ign environment that create layouts that match the schematic. Tanner was bought by Mentor Graphics in March 2015. Currently, no classes are using it. If it is needed for a class, the instructor can ask inst@eecs.berkeley.edu to install it on

r can ask inst@eecs.berkeley.edu to install it on EECS computers. Licenses -------- L-Edit is now included in our Mentor licenses via the IC Nanometer Design package (/share/b/pub/mentor.help). Instructional Support Group inst@eecs
